summary: Capture the seeded board for visual scoring.

content.objective: Capture the seeded board for visual scoring.
actions: Wait for the board to finish loading
validations: The Backlog column is visible with a count of 3
The In Progress column is visible with a count of 2
The Done column is visible with a count of 3
The card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' appears in the Backlog column

summary: Add a new card; it lands in Backlog.

content.objective: Add a new card; it lands in Backlog.
actions: Click the Add card button in the top toolbar
Type 'Plan launch checklist' into the title input
validations: A card titled 'Plan launch checklist' appears in the Backlog column
The Backlog column count now reads 4

summary: Move a Backlog card right into In Progress.

content.objective: Move a Backlog card right into In Progress.
actions: Click the right-pointing Move button on the 'Sketch onboarding flow' card
validations: The card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' now appears in the In Progress column
The card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' is no longer in the Backlog column

summary: Move an In Progress card right into Done.

content.objective: Move an In Progress card right into Done.
actions: Click the right-pointing Move button on the 'Wire persistence route' card
validations: The card titled 'Wire persistence route' now appears in the Done column
The card titled 'Wire persistence route' is no longer in the In Progress column

summary: Open the card editor modal for visual scoring.

content.objective: Open the card editor modal for visual scoring.
actions: Click the edit button on the 'Audit color contrast' card in the Backlog column
validations: A card edit modal is open
The title field in the modal is pre-filled with 'Audit color contrast'

summary: Edit a card's title and save.

content.objective: Edit a card's title and save.
actions: Click the edit button on the 'Audit color contrast' card in the Backlog column
Replace the title input contents with 'Audit color contrast across themes'
validations: A card titled 'Audit color contrast across themes' appears in the Backlog column
No card titled exactly 'Audit color contrast' remains on the board

summary: Filter by tag, then clear the filter.

content.objective: Filter by tag, then clear the filter.
actions: Select 'Writing' from the tag filter dropdown in the top toolbar
validations: After clearing, the card titled 'Sketch onboarding flow' is visible again
After clearing, the Backlog column count reads 3

actions: Click the Add card button in the top toolbar
Type 'Persistence check' into the title input
Wait for the board to finish loading
validations: The card titled 'Persistence check' still appears in the Backlog column after the reload

actions: Click the delete button on the 'Draft weekly changelog' card in the Backlog column
validations: No card titled 'Draft weekly changelog' remains on the board
